title: Teque Fritters with Australian Dipping Sauce
description: Crispy Teque fritters paired with a refreshing dipping sauce from Australia, perfect for a snack or appetizer.
instructions: In a bowl, mix together teque, flour, egg, onion, garlic, and dashing.
Heat the vegetable oil in a deep frying pan over medium-high heat.
Using a spoon, drop the teque mixture into the hot oil, making sure not to overcrowd the pan.
Fry the fritters until golden brown, about 4-5 minutes.
Remove the fritters from the oil and drain on paper towels.
Serve the fritters hot with the Australian dipping sauce.
For the Australian dipping sauce, mix together equal parts mayonnaise and ketchup with a squeeze of lime juice and a dash of dashing.
Adjust the seasoning of the fritters and dipping sauce to taste.
